allOf.description: The ARN of the IAM Identity Center instance under which the operation will be executed. For more information about ARNs, see Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) and AWS Service Namespaces in the AWS General Reference.
The ARN of the resource with the tags to be listed.
A set of key-value pairs that are used to manage the resource.
